prompt: List the active vehicles at North Yard and report each record's ID, name, and reservation date. Do not change or notify anything yet. After the correction, answer in exactly three bullets: target ID, corrected reservation date, and “Notification sent: no”.

follow_up_turns.content: For Maintenance truck 18 (VEH-6960) only, set the reservation date to 2026-11-25. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set VEH-6960's reservation date to 2026-12-11, not 2026-11-25. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first reservation date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that reservation date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both reservation date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected reservation date as current and identify the first requested reservation date as superseded.
The final response must contain exactly three bullets in this order: target ID; corrected reservation date; “Notification sent: no”.
